original_prompt: Perform deep-dive architectural audit, generate automated test suite, and manual QA checklist for Pico Inventory Pro.
rephrased_goal: Conduct exhaustive QA audit (Security, Consistency, Memory, SQL) and build systematic test coverage for core logic and auth.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Audit Authentication & Authorization logic in main.js and view.roles.js
subtasks_required: Review applyAuthorities implementation
Analyze client-side vs server-side security mapping
tasks.testing_criteria: Identity security leaks in RBAC implementation.

subtasks_required: Verify findings on hidden class bypass
Check if server-side gaps identified
tasks.analogy_reference: poke hole in fence to see if it hold
tasks.testing_criteria: Does audit point out client-side spoofing risk?

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Audit Hardware Pairing logic for consistency risks
subtasks_required: Analyze view.appointment_detail.js complete-job trigger
Analyze hardware release logic in delete-apt-btn
tasks.analogy_reference: watch two hunters throw at same bird
tasks.testing_criteria: Locate race conditions in concurrent deployment updates.

subtasks_required: Verify discovery of loop-based updates vs batch writes
Identify orphaned hardware state risks

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Audit Memory Management and Subscriptions
subtasks_required: Review controller.js destroy() implementation
Check view.reporting.js and dashboard.js for unsub() persistence
tasks.analogy_reference: put out fire before walk away
tasks.testing_criteria: Confirm firehose is shut when view leaves.

subtasks_required: Verify unsubs are actually called in all core views
Check list_group-item leak probability
tasks.analogy_reference: look for smoke after fire out

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Audit SQL Injection & Sync logic in view.reporting.js
subtasks_required: Evaluate sql.js execution context
Analyze table data fetching scale risk
tasks.analogy_reference: check water in bucket for poison
tasks.testing_criteria: Determine if local SQL can be exploited or if it DOS the app.

subtasks_required: Verify analysis of local sandbox vs remote impact
Confirm data sync volume concerns documented
tasks.analogy_reference: drink tiny drop to see if sick

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Generate Unit Tests for travel-logic.js
subtasks_required: Create src/tests/system.test.js
Implement calculateDistance and estimateDuration tests
tasks.testing_criteria: Test suite runs and asserts distance accuracy.

subtasks_required: Run src/tests/index.js
Verify output for travel-logic matches expectations

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Generate Integration Tests for Appointment Flow
subtasks_required: Implement test for status transition from available to assigned
Simulate metadata update flow
tasks.analogy_reference: track mammoth from meadow to trap
tasks.testing_criteria: DB state shifts verified after simulated job close.

subtasks_required: Verify setDoc and updateDoc assertions in test
Confirm cleanup of test data

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Generate RBAC Tests for applyAuthorities
subtasks_required: Implement DOM-based visibility test for auth classes
Verify hidden class logic assertions
tasks.testing_criteria: Access control on UI layer verified.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Draft Manual Checklist and Security Rules
subtasks_required: Write CSV parsing edge case checks
Draft Firestore Security Rules for Appointments/Items
Verify all sections of prompt covered
Check formatting as Technical Audit Report
tasks.analogy_reference: look at cave wall before tribe see

subtasks_required: Review all files
Run full test suite
Verify professional formatting
tasks.analogy_reference: walk whole trail one more time
